title: Microfrontends
excerpt: description: Split a single application into independently deployable frontends, using a router worker and service bindings image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Microfrontends let you split a single application into smaller, independently deployable units that render as one cohesive application. Different teams using different technologies can develop, test, and deploy each microfrontend. * Enable many teams to deploy independently without coordinating releases
